HomePage.title: Iroko — the shared trunk for your micro-SaaS
HomePage.description: The template you refuse to rewrite. Auth, billing, teams and deploy ready on day one.

Hero.title: The shared trunk for your micro-saas.
Hero.lead: Iroko is the template you refuse to rewrite. Auth, billing, teams and deploy — ready on day one.

Quote.proverb: Before the iroko tree is felled, the spirit of the tree must be asked for permission — for without a trunk, there are no branches.

Cta.title: Your next micro-SaaS starts this afternoon.

Auth.login_desc: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
Auth.signup_desc: Start for free today. No credit card required.
Auth.terms_privacy: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
Auth.mfa_login_desc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Please enter the code from your authenticator app.
Auth.recovery_login_desc: Enter one of your recovery codes to access your account.
Auth.confirmation_desc: We've sent a verification link to <email>{emailValue}</email>. Please click the link to confirm your account.
Auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
Auth.reset_password_desc: Pick a strong password with at least 8 characters.
Auth.magic_link_sent: We sent you a magic link. Check your email.
Auth.reset_link_sent: We sent you a password reset link. Check your email.
Auth.click_desc_signup: Click to verify your email and activate your account.
Auth.click_desc_recovery: Click to go to the password reset page.
Auth.click_desc_email_change: Click to confirm your new email address.
Auth.click_desc_invite: Click to accept the invitation and join the team.

errors.email_not_confirmed: You must confirm your email before signing in.
errors.over_request_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.over_email_send_rate_limit: Please wait a few minutes before requesting another email.
errors.user_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.confirmation_failed: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
errors.invalid_mfa_code: The code entered is incorrect or has expired.
errors.recovery_invalid: Invalid or already used recovery code.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.captcha_verification_process_failed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.unexpected_failure: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

profile.heading: Personal information
profile.bio_hint: Tell us something about yourself (max. 500 characters).
profile.email_hint: We'll send a confirmation to your current and new email.
profile.avatar_hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG. Max 2 MB.

success.email_change_requested: We sent confirmation emails to both addresses.

security.heading: Security
security.description: Protect your account with a strong password and MFA.
security.password_policy_hint: At least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase and digits.
security.reset_password_description: We'll send a reset link to your email.
security.mfa_description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.authenticator_app_desc: Use an app like Google Authenticator or Authy to generate codes.
security.recovery_codes_desc: One-time use codes to access your account if you lose your device.
security.recovery_codes_warning: Save these codes now — you won't be able to see them again.
security.mfa_modal_step1: Scan the QR code with your authenticator application.
security.mfa_modal_step2: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your application.
security.recovery_modal_desc: Save these codes in a safe place. They can only be used once.
security.delete_account_description: Your profile and personal account will be marked deleted. After 90 days they are permanently removed.

success.reset_link_sent: We sent you the reset link.

error.mfa_already_enabled: 2FA is already enabled. Disable it first.
error.mfa_no_qr: No QR code received, please try again.
error.mfa_verify_failed: Failed to verify the code. Please try again.
error.recovery_generate_failed: Failed to generate recovery codes. Please try again.

sessions.heading: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices where you're signed in. Revoke any session you don't recognize.

errors.new_password_same_as_current: New password must differ from current.
errors.no_email_on_account: This account has no email associated.
errors.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL (must start with https://).
errors.PGRST203: Database conflict. Reload the page and try again.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Manage members and permissions in your organization.
Team.no_members: No members in this organization yet.
Team.security_rbac_description: Role-Based Access Control is active. Define granular permissions for each role in your organization.
Team.emails_hint: Separate multiple emails with a comma (max 10).
Team.invite_description: Send an invitation to one or more emails to join the workspace.
Team.remove_description: Remove {name} from the team? This action cannot be undone.

ActivityLog.title: Activity
ActivityLog.subtitle: A read-only history of every change made in this account.

Errors.title: Something went wrong
Errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or go back to the home page.
Errors.dashboard_description: Could not load the dashboard content. Please try again.
Errors.auth_description: Could not complete the authentication operation.
Errors.not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

PublicFooter.brand_description: The shared trunk for your micro-SaaS. Authentication, organizations, billing and i18n — all wired up and ready to deploy.

PublicHome.hero_lead: {brand} is the template you refuse to rewrite every time. Authentication, organizations, billing, i18n — all wired to Supabase and ready for you to rebrand and deploy your next project in an afternoon.
PublicHome.features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
PublicHome.features_lead: Every module is wired up from the first commit. No chained dependencies, no cryptic configuration.
PublicHome.feature_auth_desc: Email/password, OAuth, magic link, MFA TOTP and recovery codes. All wired to Supabase Auth from the first commit.
PublicHome.feature_orgs_desc: Multi-tenant out-of-the-box. Email invitations, granular RBAC and data isolation per organization at the RLS level.
PublicHome.feature_billing_desc: Stripe wired with webhooks, customer portals and upgrade/downgrade. Plans live in the database, not in the code.
PublicHome.feature_i18n_desc: next-intl with localized routes, typed message files and support for Spanish and English from the first deploy.
PublicHome.feature_darkmode_desc: Material Design 3 token system with full dark mode. CSS variables that adapt to the OS without flash.
PublicHome.feature_db_desc: Versioned SQL schema with automatic migrations via Supabase CLI. RLS policies with integrated InitPlan optimization.
PublicHome.quote_attribution: Akan Wisdom · Ghana and Ivory Coast
PublicHome.pricing_lead: Start free. Scale when you need to.
PublicHome.tier_personal_desc: For solo projects and quick experiments.
PublicHome.tier_studio_desc: For teams building and launching real products.
PublicHome.tier_custom_desc: For agencies and teams with specific needs.
PublicHome.cta_title: Your next micro-SaaS starts this afternoon.
PublicHome.cta_lead: Don't rewrite the boilerplate again. Clone, rebrand and deploy.

PublicPricing.header_lead: Start free. Scale when your product needs it.
PublicPricing.tier_personal_desc: For solo projects and quick experiments.
PublicPricing.tier_studio_desc: For teams building and launching real products.
PublicPricing.tier_custom_desc: For agencies and teams with specific needs.
PublicPricing.cta_title: Your next micro-SaaS starts this afternoon.
PublicPricing.cta_lead: No credit card. No lock-in. The code is yours.

PublicProduct.hero_lead: Every architectural decision is documented and justified. No black magic, no unnecessary abstractions. Just code you can read, modify and deploy.
PublicProduct.features_lead: Not demos or examples. Production modules with tests, strict typing and complete error handling.
PublicProduct.feature_auth_desc: Email/password, Google OAuth, magic link, MFA TOTP, recovery codes. All wired to Supabase Auth with per-user RLS.
PublicProduct.feature_multitenant_desc: Organizations with roles (owner/admin/member), email invitations and data isolation at the database level.
PublicProduct.feature_stripe_desc: Webhooks, customer portals, plan upgrade/downgrade. Plans are managed from the DB, not from the code.
PublicProduct.feature_i18n_desc: Localized routes, typed messages, ES/EN support. Adding a new language is changing a JSON file.
PublicProduct.feature_dark_desc: Material Design 3 tokens as CSS variables. The theme adapts to the system without flash or wrong hydration.
PublicProduct.feature_schema_desc: SQL in /supabase/schemas/, automatic migrations via CLI, RLS policies with integrated InitPlan optimization.
PublicProduct.tech_lead: No invented frameworks. No niche libraries. Just the tools the ecosystem has already validated.
PublicProduct.cta_title: Ready to launch your next product?
PublicProduct.cta_lead: Everything you need, nothing you don't. Clone, rebrand, deploy.

PublicSolutions.hero_lead: {brand} adapts to the scale and context of each project. From the indie hacker to the established product team.
PublicSolutions.section_lead: The same trunk supports very different projects. The difference is how you rebrand it and what you build on top.
PublicSolutions.case_solo_desc: One developer, one idea, one afternoon. {brand} gives you the complete foundation to focus on your product's differentiator.
PublicSolutions.case_agency_desc: Launch client projects with the same architecture every time. Rebrand tokens, change copy, deploy in hours.
PublicSolutions.case_teams_desc: Skip the scaffolding and jump straight to the features that matter. CI/CD, testing and code quality already configured.
PublicSolutions.quote_attribution: Akan Wisdom · Ghana and Ivory Coast
PublicSolutions.cta_title: Ready to launch in an afternoon?
PublicSolutions.cta_lead: No credit card. No lock-in. The code is completely yours.

PublicContact.title: Have questions? We're here.
PublicContact.lead: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

Robot.error_only_xlsx: For security, only .xlsx files are allowed (no macros).
Robot.error_file_too_large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size (5MB).
Robot.card_description: Upload the Excel file (.xlsx) with the robot's routines, contacts and memory. Previous data will be replaced.
Robot.dropzone_placeholder: Click or drag a file here
Robot.viewer_desc: Review the configuration currently loaded in the robot's memory and download previous versions.

Billing.page_description: Manage your plan, payment method and invoice history.
Billing.cancel_confirm: Cancel your subscription at the end of the current period?

Projects.page_lead: Every project is a branch growing from the same {brand} trunk.
Projects.dialog_desc: Every project is a branch growing from the same {brand} trunk.
Projects.form_type_agent_desc: Bot with its own memory and context
Projects.detail_empty_desc: Create the first one to start documenting this project.

Shortcuts.dialog_desc: List of keyboard shortcuts available in the application.

OrgSettings.page_description: Manage the general settings, security and integrations of your workspace.
OrgSettings.api_keys_lead: Authenticate calls to the public API. Each key is shown only once, at creation.
OrgSettings.api_keys_created_desc: You won't be able to see it again. Store it somewhere safe.
OrgSettings.api_keys_revoke_confirm: Revoke this key? Integrations using it will stop working.
OrgSettings.api_keys_not_authorized: Only owners and admins can manage API keys.
OrgSettings.api_keys_error: Could not load the API keys. Try again.
OrgSettings.webhooks_lead: Receive your account's events on HTTPS endpoints, signed with HMAC.
OrgSettings.webhooks_secret_desc: Use it to verify the X-Iroko-Signature header. You won't be able to see it again.
OrgSettings.webhooks_delete_confirm: Delete this endpoint? Its delivery history will be removed too.
OrgSettings.webhooks_not_authorized: Only owners and admins can manage webhooks.
OrgSettings.webhooks_error: Could not load the webhooks. Try again.
OrgSettings.webhooks_validation_error: Check the URL (https, public host) and pick at least one event.
OrgSettings.security_toggle_mfa_desc: All members must enable 2FA to access the workspace.
OrgSettings.security_toggle_sessions_desc: Close duplicate sessions when the same user signs in from another device.
OrgSettings.security_toggle_audit_desc: Record all critical actions performed on the platform.
OrgSettings.integrations_lead: Connect external tools to your workspace. Integrations are configured here.
OrgSettings.danger_delete_desc: This action is permanent. All data, projects and members will be deleted.
